# Repository Operating Guide

When working in this repository, always follow the rules below.

## README Handling

- If a question or task involves setup steps, startup procedures, directory structure, npm scripts, or anything documented in `README.md`, check `README.md` first and reference its content as needed in your response or implementation.

## Writing PR Descriptions

- When creating a Pull Request description, always refer to `docs/pull-request-template.md` and write the description following that template's section structure.

## PR Review Language

- If a PR review is requested, write review comments in Japanese.
